name: Tenacity Relic
description: A basic Eridian relic focused on Fight For Your Life survivability, extending how long you can stay downed before dying. Some versions also improve the health restored by a Second Wind.
notes: Its role overlaps with Heart of the Ancients, which adds weapon-category damage to similar Tenacity-style bonuses.

special.description: Extends the time you can stay in Fight For Your Life before dying. Some versions also boost the health restored after a Second Wind.
